name: Dragon (Nuance)
description: Veteran professional dictation suite, strong custom vocabulary

developer.comment: Nuance Communications acquired by Microsoft in March 2022; the Dragon desktop line continues under Nuance branding.

first-release.comment: Dragon NaturallySpeaking 1.0, the first continuous-dictation product, released June 1997. The current desktop product is Dragon Professional v16 (Feb 28, 2023).

status.comment: Dragon Professional v16 for Windows is the current sold product. Mac support was discontinued in 2018.

primary-type.comment: Core purpose is real-time speak-to-type dictation; also offers batch audio-file transcription as a secondary capability.

real-time-dictation.comment: Front-end (live) speech-to-text: your words appear as you speak.

file-transcription.comment: Supports transcription of pre-recorded audio files, including batch processing via the Auto Transcribe Folder Agent (ATFA).

live-meeting-capture.comment: No meeting-bot or live conference-audio capture; designed for single-user dictation.

streaming-low-latency.comment: Live front-end dictation produces a running transcript in near-real-time as you speak.

audio-sources.comment: Microphone for live dictation; pre-recorded audio files (incl. Nuance-approved recorders) for transcription. No meeting-bot or system-audio capture.

underlying-engine.comment: Nuance's proprietary engine; v16 uses Nuance Deep Learning technology (earlier versions used hidden Markov models).

language-count.comment: Approx. Desktop Dragon supports around 8 languages (English variants, Dutch, French, German, Italian, Spanish); a given license is tied to one language.

english-accuracy.comment: Independent reviews describe strong, near-99% accuracy out of the box with a good microphone, improving with profile training, though users report degradation in poor audio conditions. No published WER figure; vendor '99%' claim treated skeptically.

multilingual-auto-detect.comment: Language is fixed per profile/license; no automatic detection or mixed-language transcription.

custom-vocabulary.comment: Strong custom-vocabulary support: import word lists, add names/acronyms/terminology, and a vocabulary editor for industry-specific terms.

speaker-diarization.comment: Single-speaker dictation tool; no automatic speaker separation/labeling.

timestamps.comment: No evidence Dragon Professional produces word/segment timestamps; it outputs dictated text into documents rather than time-coded transcripts. Left null as undetermined.

ai-summaries-notes.comment: No AI summarization or meeting-notes generation; it is a dictation/transcription tool.

built-in-editor.comment: Includes the DragonPad editor and voice-driven correction/proofing (with text-to-speech read-back) for reviewing dictated text. Plain text editing, not media-by-text.

export-formats.comment: Dictates directly into Word/text documents and can save text/RTF/DOCX. No subtitle (SRT/VTT) or JSON export typical of media transcribers.

processing-location.comment: Desktop Dragon Professional processes speech locally on the Windows PC; no internet required for recognition. (The separate Dragon Anywhere mobile app is cloud-based.)

offline-capable.comment: Works fully offline; local processing means confidential audio never leaves the device.

data-used-for-training.comment: On-device local processing means audio stays on the user's PC and is not sent to Nuance for training. Profile adaptation is local to the user.

data-deletion-control.comment: Profiles, transcripts and documents are stored locally on the user's machine and can be managed/deleted by the user.

platforms.comment: Dragon Professional v16 is Windows-only (Windows 10/11). Mac support was discontinued in 2018; the separate Dragon Anywhere app covers iOS/Android.

system-wide-dictation.comment: Dictates into virtually any Windows application document, not just its own window.

integrations.comment: No meeting-platform (Zoom/Meet/Teams) or app integrations; it injects text into desktop applications directly.

api-automation.comment: User-creatable custom voice commands/scripting (Advanced Scripting, macros) to automate form-filling and business processes; not a public cloud API.

pricing-model.comment: Perpetual one-time license for Dragon Professional v16 (no subscription). Checked 2026-06-12.

free-tier.comment: No free tier; paid perpetual license only.

entry-price-usd-mo.comment: One-time purchase (~$699 for Dragon Professional v16), not a monthly subscription, so no per-month entry price. Checked 2026-06-12.
